message:
Add comprehensive verification beads for tokio-equivalent EPICs

Created 10 verification sub-beads with detailed test specifications:
- bd-14yh: Async Networking (x72) - unit tests, E2E, fault injection
- bd-obpv: Time/Timers (mf6) - unit tests, E2E, determinism
- bd-221m: Service Layer (lnm) - unit tests, E2E, middleware
- bd-39ik: HTTP Server/Client (if7) - unit tests, E2E, protocol
- bd-3qc6: Sync Primitives (q48) - unit tests, E2E, cancel-safety
- bd-1rn8: Async Streams (x3p) - unit tests, E2E, combinators
- bd-js88: Async Filesystem (aqy) - unit tests, E2E, fault injection
- bd-1ndg: I/O Traits (imz) - unit tests, adapters
- bd-22vb: Codecs (4nz) - unit tests, E2E, framing
- bd-hszn: gRPC (3or) - unit tests, E2E, streaming

Updated harmonization beads with detailed acceptance criteria:
- bd-zs64, bd-q0om, bd-hzrb, bd-kh65, bd-4rpn, bd-3p6e

All verification beads include:
- Comprehensive unit test categories
- E2E scenario matrices
- Fault injection / edge case tests
- Logging/diagnostics requirements
- Acceptance criteria checklists
- Verification commands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
